title: ptyline config
description: Configuration for ptyline — a PTY wrapper with a persistent status bar.

shell.description: Shell to run inside the PTY. "auto" detects from $SHELL.

refresh_interval_ms.description: Global bar refresh interval in milliseconds.

module.description: Per-module configuration keyed by module ID.

additionalProperties.description: User-defined command module. Set command = "..." to activate as {<id>} in the bar.

style.description: Per-block visual styles keyed by style ID.

BarConfig.description: Controls the reserved status bar area and layout.

height.description: Number of reserved rows. Must be 1 in the MVP.

max_height.description: Reserved for future multi-line bar support.

format.description: Placeholder template, e.g. "{hostname:<20} {cwd} || {git:^20} || {time:>8}". Use || for sections and | for separator markers. Mutually exclusive with [[bar.block]].

justify.description: Placement of the center section. center is relative to free space between left/right; absolute_center uses the full bar center when it fits.

row.description: Multi-row bar layout. Each [[bar.row]] is one line. Takes precedence over format.

separator.description: Default text drawn for | separator markers in bar formats.

block.description: Structured block layout. Mutually exclusive with format.

min_block_width.description: Minimum allocated width in cells for a block to be shown. Blocks narrower than this threshold are hidden completely instead of being truncated. 0 = disabled.

show_in_alternate_screen.description: Reserved for post-MVP: show bar while alternate screen is active.

RowConfig.description: One row of a multi-line bar.

format.description: Placeholder template for this row. Use || to split into left/center/right and | for separator markers.

fill.description: Character drawn in gaps between blocks.

separator.description: Text drawn for | separator markers in this row. Falls back to bar.separator.

BlockConfig.description: One layout block in the structured bar.

module.description: Module ID to render in this block.

anchor.description: Which side of the bar this block is anchored to.

width.description: Block width: auto, fill, N cells, or N%.

truncate.description: Truncation side when content exceeds width.

priority.description: Drop priority when bar is too narrow (lower = dropped first).

enabled.description: Enable this module. For command modules, presence of command = "..." is sufficient.

source.description: Provider source. "exec" runs a shell command; "time" clones the time module under a new ID; "template" composes other module values into one block.

format.description: Output format. For exec: {stdout}/{stderr}/{exit_code}. For time: strftime pattern. For template: {module_id} placeholders.

collapse_whitespace.description: Collapse consecutive whitespace in the assembled template value to a single space.

hide_when_empty.description: Return an empty value (hiding the block) when all referenced modules expand to empty. Literal separators do not keep the template alive.

mode.description: Module mode override, e.g. "shell-integration" for cwd.

provider.description: Compatibility alias. provider = "command" maps to source = "exec".

command.description: Shell command to run (activates this module as a user-defined command provider).

refresh_on_command.description: Foreground command prefixes that trigger an immediate refresh after exit_code is reported.

env.description: Environment variable names to display (env module).

timeout_ms.description: Per-refresh timeout in milliseconds. Defaults to 1000 for command modules.

max_width.description: Maximum output width in terminal cells. Defaults to 60 for command modules.

done_min_duration_ms.description: Minimum command duration to show in the bar (command module).

done_success_ttl_ms.description: How long to show a successful command result (command module).

done_failure_ttl_ms.description: How long to show a failed command result (command module). 0 = keep until next command.

icon.description: Where to render the module icon. Omit to disable the icon.

icon_glyph.description: Preferred Nerd Font glyph for this module. Used by custom exec modules and as an override for built-ins.

StyleConfig.description: Visual style for a bar block.

fg.description: Foreground color — theme token (e.g. "base.fg") or hex (#rrggbb).

bg.description: Background color — theme token or hex.

left_cap.description: Custom left cap glyph for this styled block.

right_cap.description: Custom right cap glyph for this styled block.

ThemeConfig.description: Color scheme and style preset selection.

fallback.description: Fallback icon set when primary is unavailable.

palette.description: Custom color overrides keyed by token name.

status.description: Status level color overrides (ok, warn, error).

emoji_width.description: Cell width assumed for emoji glyphs.

fallback.description: Fall back to ASCII icons when preset glyphs are unavailable.

WidthValue.description: Block width: "auto", "fill", a number of cells ("20"), or a percentage ("30%").
